descriptionHtml:
Fountaine Pajot MY6 For Sale 2022 | Owner's Version 3 Cabins + 1 Crew Cabin | Tax Not Paid

If you are considering a contemporary power catamaran, the Fountaine Pajot MY6 For Sale 2022 stands out as a practical option in today’s market. Launched in 2022 and delivered to her first owner in 2023, she is in good condition and is available in the sought-after Owner’s version, which is popular for its spacious accommodation and thoughtful layout.

Specifications:

  • Boat Type: Motor Catamaran
  • Year Built: 2022 (delivered 2023)
  • Condition: Good
  • Cabins: 3 + 1 (Owner’s version)
  • Heads: 3 electric + 1 manual (1 holding tank, 350L)
  • Length Over All (LOA): 13.40 m
  • Beam: 6.61 m
  • Draft: 1.95 m
  • Fuel Tank: 2 x 1000 L
  • Water Tank: 2 x 350 L
  • Engines: 2 x 480 hp Volvo Penta IPS 650 (666 hours, Sept 2024)
  • Generator: Fischer Panta 10kW, 220V, 50Hz (602 hours, Sept 2024)
  • Watermaker: 110 L/h
  • Air Conditioning: 4 units (3 cabins, 1 saloon)
  • Galley: Gas stove, Bosch fridge, Bosch dishwasher
  • Laundry: Washing and drying machine
  • Solar Panels: 3 x 100W on hardtop
  • Bimini: Hardtop, hydraulic
  • Navigation: GARMIN x2, plotter, GPS, autopilot
  • Steering Wheel: 1 main, 1 repeater on flybridge
  • Deck Shower: Yes
  • Swim Platform: Hydraulic
  • Dinghy & Outboard: Yes
  • Sound System: Fusion with USB/Bluetooth, Bose in saloon/cockpit/flybridge
  • Wet Bar (Flybridge): Sink, fridge, small BBQ
  • Inverter: Yes
  • Gangway: Hydraulic

Overall, the Fountaine Pajot MY6 For Sale 2022 offers a balance of practical features, comfortable living spaces, and modern equipment for leisure cruising. She is available and ready for inspection. Contact us!
